narrative:
Cols 72-E (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,197 registered voters, with 54.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.6%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.3 percentage points.
